name: Home Daycare Provider — T2125 Proration and T4E
description: Complete Clara Yip's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return for her home daycare business. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\yip\. Save the completed return as 'clara_yip.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income) - Daycare section
metadata.key_complexity: T2125 Business-Use-of-Home time-and-space proration; 100% deductible daycare food expenses; T4E maternity benefits entry.
